forward_patch:
--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+---
+depends_on:
+- 01KXHBDW50GFJS4TH0HGS0D3KP
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: '9280'
+title: 'ACP→Transcript utility: SessionUpdate stream into a FoundationModels Transcript'
+---
+## What
+Ship the symmetric half of the bridge in this package (spec §9, §10 — decided 2026-07-14: ship here so AgentViewKit consumes any ACP agent uniformly), in `Sources/FoundationModelsACP/Bridge/`:
+
+- A client-side utility that folds an `AsyncStream<SessionUpdate>` into a growing FoundationModels `Transcript`:
+  - `agent_message_chunk` → `.response` text
+  - `tool_call` / `tool_call_update` → `.toolCalls` / `.toolOutput` (correlated by `toolCallId`)
+  - `agent_thought_chunk`, `plan`, and permission requests → custom `.structure` segments
+- The ACP client thereby becomes just another producer of the same Transcript AgentViewKit already renders — the inverse of the §7 mapping.
+- Round-trip property: a turn mapped FM → ACP (bridge task) and back through this utility reproduces an equivalent Transcript (lossless round-trip, spec §7).
+- Apply the same straggler policy as the session-update stream task: late `tool_call_update`s still fold in.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+- [ ] Each SessionUpdate variant folds into the documented Transcript entry type
+- [ ] Round-trip test: scripted Transcript → bridge → SessionUpdate stream → this utility → Transcript, equivalent modulo documented lossy fields (none expected)
+- [ ] Late tool_call_update after the turn's final message still updates the corresponding toolOutput
+
+## Tests
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsACPTests/Bridge/ACPToTranscriptTests.swift` — per-variant folding + straggler handling
+- [ ] `Tests/FoundationModelsACPTests/Bridge/RoundTripTests.swift` — FM → ACP → FM equivalence on golden turns
+- [ ] Run `swift test` — exits 0
+
+## Workflow
+- Use `/tdd` — write failing tests first, then implement to make them pass.
\ No newline at end of file
